requirement_topic.en: Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 2016/2281 — Seasonal Performance (SCOP) and SEAI Grant Eligibility
requirement_topic.zh: 生态设计法规（EU）2016/2281——季节性性能（SCOP）与SEAI补贴资格
requirement_topic.zht: 生態設計法規（EU）2016/2281——季節性性能（SCOP）與SEAI補貼資格

summary.en: Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 2016/2281 (implementing Ecodesign Directive 2009/125/EC for process heating products including air-source heat pumps) sets minimum seasonal space heating energy efficiency requirements. Performance is expressed as Seasonal Coefficient of Performance (SCOP), tested to EN 14511 at rated conditions and seasonally calculated per EN 14825. In Ireland, SEAI (Sustainable Energy Authority of Ireland) administers grant schemes (One Stop Shop, RESU, Warmer Homes) that additionally require products to appear on the SEAI Heat Pump Products List and SCOP to meet SEAI-specified thresholds (typically SCOP >= 3.2 for average Irish climate conditions). Products not on the SEAI list are ineligible for grants even if CE-marked.
summary.zh: 生态设计法规（EU）2016/2281（实施生态设计指令2009/125/EC，适用于包括空气源热泵在内的工艺供热产品）设定了最低季节性空间供暖能效要求。性能以季节性性能系数（SCOP）表示，按EN 14511额定工况测试，并依据EN 14825进行季节性计算。在爱尔兰，爱尔兰可持续能源局（SEAI）管理补贴计划（一站式服务、RESU、暖家计划），额外要求产品列入SEAI热泵产品名单，且SCOP须满足SEAI规定门槛（爱尔兰平均气候条件下通常SCOP >= 3.2）。未列入SEAI名单的产品即使已取得CE标志也不符合补贴资格。
summary.zht: 生態設計法規（EU）2016/2281（實施生態設計指令2009/125/EC，適用於包括空氣源熱泵在內的工藝供熱產品）設定了最低季節性空間供暖能效要求。性能以季節性性能係數（SCOP）表示，按EN 14511額定工況測試，並依據EN 14825進行季節性計算。在愛爾蘭，愛爾蘭可持續能源局（SEAI）管理補貼計畫（一站式服務、RESU、暖家計畫），額外要求產品列入SEAI熱泵產品名單，且SCOP須滿足SEAI規定門檻（愛爾蘭平均氣候條件下通常SCOP >= 3.2）。未列入SEAI名單的產品即使已取得CE標誌也不符合補貼資格。

standards_or_laws: SEAI Heat Pump Products List (Irish grant eligibility)

summary.en: GB/T 18430.2 (Water chilling packages and heat pump units using the vapor compression cycle — Testing and rating for performance) and GB 19577 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners) specify COP at rated conditions for Chinese heat pump products. Neither standard employs the EU SCOP seasonal methodology (EN 14825 climate bins); Chinese rated COP data cannot be directly converted to EU Ecodesign SCOP values. GB/T 25127 addresses low-ambient-temperature heating performance but does not produce SCOP values.
summary.zh: GB/T 18430.2（蒸气压缩循环冷水（热泵）机组——性能测试与额定）和GB 19577（房间空调器能效限定值及能效等级）规定了中国热泵产品额定工况下的COP。这两项标准均未采用欧盟SCOP季节性方法（EN 14825气候区间）；中国额定COP数据不能直接换算为欧盟生态设计SCOP值。GB/T 25127涵盖低环境温度制热性能，但不产生SCOP值。
summary.zht: GB/T 18430.2（蒸氣壓縮循環冷水（熱泵）機組——性能測試與額定）和GB 19577（房間空調器能效限定值及能效等級）規定了中國熱泵產品額定工況下的COP。這兩項標準均未採用歐盟SCOP季節性方法（EN 14825氣候區間）；中國額定COP數據不能直接換算為歐盟生態設計SCOP值。GB/T 25127涵蓋低環境溫度制熱性能，但不產生SCOP值。

gap.en: No SCOP methodology equivalent in Chinese standards. Chinese efficiency test data (COP at rated conditions) cannot be used to demonstrate compliance with EU Ecodesign seasonal efficiency thresholds. Full re-testing to EN 14511 and seasonal performance calculation to EN 14825 is required. Additionally, for SEAI grant eligibility in Ireland, the product must be listed on the SEAI Heat Pump Products List — a purely Irish administrative step with no Chinese equivalent — and SCOP must meet SEAI-specified thresholds.
gap.zh: 中国标准中没有等效的SCOP方法。中国效率测试数据（额定工况COP）不能用于证明符合欧盟生态设计季节性效率门槛。需按EN 14511重新进行全面测试，并按EN 14825计算季节性性能。此外，为符合爱尔兰SEAI补贴资格，产品须列入SEAI热泵产品名单——这是爱尔兰特有的行政步骤，中国无对应制度——且SCOP须满足SEAI规定门槛。
gap.zht: 中國標準中沒有等效的SCOP方法。中國效率測試數據（額定工況COP）不能用於證明符合歐盟生態設計季節性效率門檻。需按EN 14511重新進行全面測試，並按EN 14825計算季節性性能。此外，為符合愛爾蘭SEAI補貼資格，產品須列入SEAI熱泵產品名單——這是愛爾蘭特有的行政步驟，中國無對應制度——且SCOP須滿足SEAI規定門檻。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU Ecodesign — market access); Recommended for SEAI grants (SEAI Product List listing is grant-eligibility requirement, not legal market access requirement)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (GB 19577 for applicable product categories — COP at rated conditions only)

source.publisher: SEAI — Sustainable Energy Authority of Ireland

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — no SCOP equivalent in Chinese standards; re-testing to EN 14511 and EN 14825 required for EU Ecodesign compliance; SEAI Heat Pump Products List listing additionally required for Irish grant eligibility (SCOP >= 3.2 typically required).
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——中国标准中无等效SCOP；需按EN 14511和EN 14825重新测试以满足欧盟生态设计合规要求；爱尔兰补贴资格还额外要求列入SEAI热泵产品名单（通常SCOP >= 3.2）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——中國標準中無等效SCOP；需按EN 14511和EN 14825重新測試以滿足歐盟生態設計合規要求；愛爾蘭補貼資格還額外要求列入SEAI熱泵產品名單（通常SCOP >= 3.2）。

requirement_topic.en: EU Energy Label — ErP Regulation (EU) 2013/811 (A+++ to G Scale, Ireland / NSAI)
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟能效标签——ErP法规（EU）2013/811（A+++至G等级，爱尔兰 / NSAI）
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟能效標籤——ErP法規（EU）2013/811（A+++至G等級，愛爾蘭 / NSAI）

summary.en: Energy Labelling Regulation (EU) 811/2013 (delegated under Regulation (EU) 2017/1369) requires an A+++ to G energy efficiency scale for space heaters sold in Ireland and across the EU. Heat pumps must display a seasonal efficiency class on a mandatory EU energy label affixed to the product and accompanying product information sheet (product fiche). The label format is temperature-dependent, reflecting heating output at different outdoor temperatures. NSAI acts as the Irish market surveillance authority for energy labelling compliance. Products not carrying a correct EU energy label may be removed from the Irish market.
summary.zh: 能效标签法规（EU）811/2013（依据法规（EU）2017/1369授权）要求在爱尔兰及整个欧盟销售的空间供暖设备采用A+++至G能效等级。热泵须在产品及随附产品信息单（产品档案）上粘贴强制性欧盟能效标签，显示季节性效率等级。标签格式为温度依赖型，反映不同室外温度下的供热输出。NSAI作为爱尔兰能效标签合规的市场监督机构。未粘贴正确欧盟能效标签的产品可能被责令撤出爱尔兰市场。
summary.zht: 能效標籤法規（EU）811/2013（依據法規（EU）2017/1369授權）要求在愛爾蘭及整個歐盟銷售的空間供暖設備採用A+++至G能效等級。熱泵須在產品及隨附產品資訊單（產品檔案）上粘貼強制性歐盟能效標籤，顯示季節性效率等級。標籤格式為溫度依賴型，反映不同室外溫度下的供熱輸出。NSAI作為愛爾蘭能效標籤合規的市場監督機構。未粘貼正確歐盟能效標籤的產品可能被責令撤出愛爾蘭市場。

summary.en: GB 21454 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for multi-connected air conditioning systems for commercial use) and the broader GB 12021 series govern Chinese energy efficiency labelling for heat-related products. The Chinese label uses a 1-to-5 tier system (Grade 1 = most efficient) based on COP at rated conditions. The Chinese label format, efficiency tier definitions, and rating methodology differ fundamentally from the EU A+++–G energy label; Chinese energy labels are not recognised in Ireland or the EU.
summary.zh: GB 21454（多联式空调（热泵）机组能效限定值及能效等级）及更广泛的GB 12021系列管辖中国供热相关产品的能效标识。中国标签采用1至5级体系（1级=最高效），基于额定工况COP。中国标签格式、效率等级定义及评级方法与欧盟A+++至G能效标签存在根本性差异；中国能效标识在爱尔兰或欧盟不被认可。
summary.zht: GB 21454（多聯式空調（熱泵）機組能效限定值及能效等級）及更廣泛的GB 12021系列管轄中國供熱相關產品的能效標識。中國標籤採用1至5級體系（1級=最高效），基於額定工況COP。中國標籤格式、效率等級定義及評級方法與歐盟A+++至G能效標籤存在根本性差異；中國能效標識在愛爾蘭或歐盟不被認可。

gap.en: A new EU energy label complying with Regulation (EU) 811/2013 is required before products can be placed on the Irish market. Seasonal efficiency must be re-calculated using EN 14825 methodology. Chinese energy label data (COP-based, Grade 1-5 scale) cannot be directly transposed to the EU A+++–G label. NSAI may remove non-labelled or incorrectly labelled products from the Irish market.
gap.zh: 产品须在取得符合欧盟法规811/2013的新欧盟能效标签后方可在爱尔兰市场销售。季节性效率须按EN 14825方法重新计算。中国能效标签数据（基于COP，1-5级）不能直接换算为欧盟A+++至G标签。NSAI可责令未粘贴标签或标签不符合要求的产品撤出爱尔兰市场。
gap.zht: 產品須在取得符合歐盟法規811/2013的新歐盟能效標籤後方可在愛爾蘭市場銷售。季節性效率須按EN 14825方法重新計算。中國能效標籤數據（基於COP，1-5級）不能直接換算為歐盟A+++至G標籤。NSAI可責令未粘貼標籤或標籤不符合要求的產品撤出愛爾蘭市場。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU energy label required before market placement in Ireland; NSAI is market surveillance authority)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (Chinese energy label under GB 21454 / GB 12021 series — not recognised in Ireland or EU)

source.publisher: NSAI — National Standards Authority of Ireland

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — new EU energy label required (Regulation (EU) 811/2013); Chinese GB 21454 label not accepted in Ireland; seasonal efficiency must be re-tested to EN 14511 and recalculated to EN 14825 before label can be issued.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——需要新的欧盟能效标签（欧盟法规811/2013）；中国GB 21454标签在爱尔兰不被接受；须按EN 14511重新测试并按EN 14825重新计算季节性效率后方可出具标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——需要新的歐盟能效標籤（歐盟法規811/2013）；中國GB 21454標籤在愛爾蘭不被接受；須按EN 14511重新測試並按EN 14825重新計算季節性效率後方可出具標籤。
